subheadline: From first sync to board-ready report, each piece is built to work together out of the box.

items.title: Unified data warehouse
items.description: Every source lands in one governed store, so your team queries a single source of truth instead of stitching exports together.

items.title: SOC 2 Type II secure
items.description: Encryption at rest and in transit, SSO, and full audit logs keep security and legal teams comfortable.

items.title: Sub-second queries
items.description: A columnar engine returns answers on billions of rows before your coffee cools.

items.title: Alerts that reach people
items.description: Route anomalies straight to Slack or email the moment a metric moves.

items.title: No-code report builder
items.description: Drag, drop, and publish a polished dashboard without writing a line of SQL.
